name: strands-crm
description: Northstar — an AI sales CRM showcase built with CopilotKit, the AG-UI protocol, and a TypeScript Strands agent.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:ui" --names agent,ui --prefix-colors green,blue --kill-others
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix agent install && npm --prefix frontend install
